# dotr v0.1.1

This patch release tightens the daemon/watch defaults and simplifies Git automation.

## Highlights

- Default starter configs now use `backup_interval_secs = 300` and enable Git auto-commit by default.
- `watch.enabled` has been removed. Use `dotr watch` or `dotr daemon start` to run the watcher.
- The legacy `min_backup_interval_secs` name is still accepted and serialized back as `backup_interval_secs`.
- Watch mode now ignores self-triggered changes from generated `custom_backup` outputs, such as Homebrew `Brewfile` updates.
- Auto-commit now stages and commits only dotr-managed paths: `dotr.toml`, `files/`, `metadata/`, `recipients`, and `.gitignore`.
- `git.include_unrelated` has been removed because unrelated repository files are excluded by commit pathspecs.

## Upgrade Notes

- Remove `watch.enabled` from older `dotr.toml` files.
- Remove `git.include_unrelated` from older `dotr.toml` files.
- Prefer `[watch].backup_interval_secs` over the old `min_backup_interval_secs` spelling.
